I found five candidate call sites. Next I’ll inspect each location to extract the enclosing function names and confirm none are inside test-only blocks.
I’ve mapped the enclosing functions for each hit; now I’m verifying whether either file has `#[cfg(test)]` sections so we can confidently exclude test-only code.

item.text: The knowledge-graph trait lookup worked; I’m now pulling code references to that trait to confirm call sites from a symbol-aware index.
I’m running one final mechanical check to bind each hit to its nearest enclosing `fn` line, so the final list is deterministic.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "rg -n --glob 'crates/orbit-engine/src/**/*.rs' --glob '"'!**/tests/**'"' --glob '"'!**/examples/**'"' '\\.run_deterministic' crates/orbit-engine/src | while IFS=: read -r file line _; do fn="'$(awk -v n="$line" '"'NR<=n && "'$0 ~ /''^[[:space:]]*(pub[[:space:]]+)?(async[[:space:]]+)?fn[[:space:]]+[A-Za-z0-9_]+/ { if (match($0, /fn[[:space:]]+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)/, m)) name=m[1] } END { print name }'"' \""'$file"); printf '"'%s:%s:%s\\n' \""'$file" "$line" "$fn"; done'

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n --glob 'crates/orbit-engine/src/**/*.rs' --glob '"'!**/tests/**'"' --glob '"'!**/examples/**'"' '\\.run_deterministic' crates/orbit-engine/src | while IFS=: read -r file line _; do fn="'$(awk -v n="$line" '"'NR<=n && "'$0 ~ /''^[[:space:]]*(pub[[:space:]]+)?(async[[:space:]]+)?fn[[:space:]]+[A-Za-z0-9_]+/ { if (match($0, /fn[[:space:]]+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)/, m)) name=m[1] } END { print name }'"' \""'$file"); printf '"'%s:%s:%s\\n' \""'$file" "$line" "$fn"; done'
